# sploot-058: mixed wrapped and plain criteria

Priority: P1 | Status: ready

## Goal
Persist and replay gallery mutations safely.

## Oracle
- [ ] The mutation journal appends every `Append`, `Replace`, and `Delete` op with a monotonic
    sequence number, a wall-clock timestamp, and the idempotency key supplied by the caller.
- [ ] Replay of the journal reconstructs the same final gallery state.
